assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The response does not mention upgrading the GKE control plane first, which is a critical prerequisite step

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Response clearly specifies coordinating→data→master upgrade order with rationale that coordinating nodes are stateless and safest first

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Regional PVs: Your regional pd-ssd volumes will automatically reattach to new nodes' in key success factors

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Pod Disruption Budgets (PDB) or configuring minAvailable=2 for master quorum protection

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Response specifies --max-surge-upgrade=1 --max-unavailable-upgrade=0 for both data and master node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes monitoring ES cluster health during upgrades and post-upgrade verification with wait_for_status=green

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Response does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain as a safety measure

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Response does not include kubectl rollout status commands for StatefulSets, only general node and pod monitoring

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed backup instructions in pre-upgrade preparation section with snapshot creation commands
